species: Extracellular vesicles released from the filarial parasite Brugia malayi downregulate the host mTOR pathway
cell_type: we confirmed internalization of mf-derived EVs by human DCs and monocytes...
disease_state: Lymphatic filariasis, a neglected tropical disease caused by parasitic worms...
sample_source: Human monocytes used for this study were isolated from leukopaks from healthy donors...
cell_line: mf-derived EVs downregulate the phosphorylation of mTOR in human monocytes (THP-1 cells)...
